insights: FY26 rev ₹2,507cr +59%, EBITDA ₹2,265cr +61%; Q4 rev ₹705cr, PAT ₹138cr.

insights: Operational capacity 19.3 GW (+35% YoY); 5.1 GW greenfield added — highest globally ex-China.
